title: rubus vulgaris var. microphyllus
intro: Rubus vulgaris var. microphyllus, also known as the dwarf or miniature European raspberry, is a compact shrub that belongs to the rose family and is native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus vulgaris var. microphyllus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, as well as its traditional use to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Rubus vulgaris var. microphyllus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional medicine to make jams, preserves, and other food products.
